label: 725 Repealed. ,Feb. 10, 1936, ch. 4249 Stat. 1106
notes: Section, , as added , , related to issuance of tax exemption certificates.act Apr. 21, 1934, ch. 157, § 25June 20, 1934, ch. 68748 Stat. 1184

Collection of Unpaid Taxes, , amending , , which repealed this section provided that no tax, civil penalty, or interest which accrued under any provision of law repealed by said act , and which was uncollected on date of enactment of said act , was to be collected; and all liens for taxes, civil penalties, or interest arising out of taxes under such provisions of law were cancelled and released.Act Mar. 2, 1936, ch. 11249 Stat. 1155act Feb. 10, 1936, ch. 4249 Stat. 1106Feb. 10, 1936Feb. 10, 1936
